prose:
Method–provenance block
• Property: frontier-orbital energies and HOMO–LUMO gap (eV), single-point; Koopmans descriptors included.
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (exact four-center integrals, density fitting OFF).
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied fixed geometry tempo.xyz (no relaxation) → single-point B3LYP/def2-TZVP//input-xyz.
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
• Charge 0; multiplicity 2 (open-shell doublet, UKS).
• Software: PySCF via chemkit “frontier-orbitals” skill.
• Convergence: SCF converged in 12 cycles; integrity.trustworthy = true.
• Warnings: none reported.

Key numerical results (eV)
  HOMO-2  −7.3057732
  HOMO-1  −6.9286592
  HOMO    −6.3375439
  LUMO    −2.4651235
  LUMO+1   0.58631725
  LUMO+2   0.59688153
  → HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV

Koopmans-type descriptors
  Vertical IP  = 6.3375439 eV
  Vertical EA  = 2.4651235 eV
  Electronegativity = 4.4013337 eV
  Chemical hardness = 1.9362102 eV
  Chemical softness  = 0.51647286 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity index = 5.0024886 eV

No warnings were emitted by chemkit; result is flagged trustworthy. Live PySCF log was written during the run (frontier_*.out) and contains full SCF details and the cli_invocation for reproducibility.
